basic_details.job_title: IIM Guwahati Assistant Librarian Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Guwahati (IIM Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Guwahati (IIM Guwahati) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Management Guwahati has released the official notification for Assistant Librarian posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Assam. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid education jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation will be applicable as per GOI rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Library and Information Science (MLISc) with NET/SLET/SET qualified.
qualification.details: Master's Degree in Library and Information Science (MLISc) from a recognized University/Institution with NET/SLET/SET qualified. Overall 8 years of experience in academic, institutional, or research libraries is desirable. Knowledge of library automation software, digital library systems, and e-resource management. Proficiency in MS Office and information management systems.

salary_details.details: Pay and benefits in Paylevel 08 under 7th CPC.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Guwahati Assistant Librarian Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 06-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Guwahati to complete the application.
